description: Tests that tdd enforces vertical red-green-refactor slices testing behavior through public interfaces, not implementation

tests.prompt: Jag ska lägga till en ny funktion i scanner.py.
tests.expected_output_description: Write one failing test, minimal code to pass, refactor, repeat — vertical slices

assertions.check: Output recommends writing a failing test first before writing the implementation
Output mentions writing only the minimal code needed to make the test pass
Output describes a refactor step after the test is green
Output advises one test at a time (vertical slices), not writing all tests up front
Output mentions testing observable behavior through the public interface, not implementation details

tests.expected_output_description: A test that never fails verifies nothing

assertions.check: Output explains that a test which never fails does not actually verify anything
